title: Cursors Extended : Theme Windows (Mini)
description: Resource pack theme for [Cursors Extended Mod] mini cursor windows theme.
body:
# What is the theme :
this resource pack turn your cursor style into a mini pixelated style like Minecraft but it's required a mod called [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) to work.
# Why is not working ?
Install this mod first --> [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor)
# Summary
A resource pack that brings the cursor from Windows to Java Edition and expands upon it with even more cursors!
Requires the [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod to work.


<details>
<summary>Click me to see :)</summary>
